title: cordia obtusa
intro: Cordia obtusa, also known as the Bead Tree or Ushira, is a tropical plant species native to the Indian subcontinent and Southeast Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which can be used to treat various health issues such as fever, skin infections, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Cordia obtusa include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Cordia obtusa include teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions and promote overall well-being.
